ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the building */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the building */,
  "construction_start_date" TEXT /* Date when construction started */,
  "construction_end_date" TEXT /* Date when construction was completed */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "building_area" REAL /* Total area of the building in square meters */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal zone */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building the zone belongs to */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the thermal zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thermal zone */,
  "zone_area" REAL /* Area of the thermal zone in square meters */,
  "zone_volume" REAL /* Volume of the thermal zone in cubic meters */,
  "zone_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the thermal zone (e.g., north, south) */,
  "zone_height" REAL /* Height of the thermal zone in meters */,
  "zone_material" TEXT /* Primary material used in the thermal zone (e.g., concrete, glass) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_zones_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heating_cooling_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heating/cooling type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the heating/cooling type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heating/cooling type */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the heating/cooling type */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Cost of installing the heating/cooling type */,
  "operational_cost" REAL /* Operational cost per hour of the heating/cooling type */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance required (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design load */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal zone the load belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the heating/cooling type */,
  "load_value" REAL /* Value of the design load */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the design load (e.g., ton, kBtu/h) */,
  "load_source" TEXT /* Source of the load (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "load_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the load (e.g., manual, software) */,
  "load_date" TEXT /* Date when the load was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_loads_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_loads_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES heating_cooling_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing factor */,
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the design load the factor belongs to */,
  "factor_value" REAL /* Value of the sizing factor */,
  "factor_source" TEXT /* Source of the sizing factor (e.g., manufacturer, empirical data) */,
  "factor_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the sizing factor (e.g., manual, software) */,
  "factor_date" TEXT /* Date when the sizing factor was determined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_factors_load_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_id") REFERENCES design_loads ("load_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air flow */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal zone the flow belongs to */,
  "flow_value" REAL /* Value of the air flow */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the air flow (e.g., ft^3/min) */,
  "flow_source" TEXT /* Source of the air flow data (e.g., sensors, simulations) */,
  "flow_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the air flow (e.g., manual, software) */,
  "flow_date" TEXT /* Date when the air flow was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_flows_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal zone the weather data belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Outdoor temperature at peak load (F) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Outdoor humidity ratio at peak load (lbWater/lbAir) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of peak load */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the weather data */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of the weather data */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation at the time of the weather data */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation at the time of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Employee ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal zone being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the building design */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_versions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_versions_version_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_zones_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal zone the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the thermal zone configuration */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_zones_versions_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_zones_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_zones_versions_version_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heating_cooling_types_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the heating/cooling type the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the heating/cooling type */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heating_cooling_types_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heating_cooling_types_versions_version_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heating_cooling_types_versions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES heating_cooling_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
